title: Gratitude
prompt: List at least 3 things you are grateful for.

title: The Worry Dump
prompt: List absolutely everything taking up space in your mind right now. Get it all on paper so you don't have to hold it in your head overnight.

title: Worry Postponement
prompt: Pick the biggest worry from your list. What specific time tomorrow will you dedicate 15 minutes to actively think about it?

title: Preparation
prompt: What is one small, simple thing you can do tonight to make tomorrow morning slightly easier?

title: Positive Anchoring
prompt: What is one thing you survived or handled well today, no matter how small?
